Container.Name: metaden
Container.Overview: MetaDen Movie File Renamer — Automatically renames movie files using IMDB/TMDB data. Browse a folder of video files, search IMDB for matches, download posters, and rename with a configurable format template. Built with FastAPI + Vue 3.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the MetaDen web interface.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Where MetaDen stores its configuration and settings.

Config.Name: Media Path
Config.Description: Root path to your media. You will browse this folder from within MetaDen to find movies to rename.

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: Your TMDB API key for downloading movie posters. Get a free key at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

Config.Name: OMDb API Key
Config.Description: Your OMDb API key for IMDB movie data. Get a free key at https://www.omdbapi.com/apikey.aspx

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Use the ID of the user who owns your media files.
